improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then join from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant | GDN AI"><meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with 3 free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-gideon-preview.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, and Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the Claude-powered claim builds trust, while mentioning the free searches and low entry price reduces friction. These tags are foundational SEO elements that are currently missing or incomplete.

improvements.suggestion:
Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business decisions. Try three free searches — no credit card required.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately names the product and its core function, while the subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) and removes friction by emphasizing the free trial with no payment barrier. The copy is direct, benefit-driven, and builds trust without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a Gideon member. Membership starts at just US$2 per day and gives you unlimited access to your own AI-powered workspace, voice chat, and professional trade and business support. Choose monthly billing or save 30 percent with an annual plan.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the conversion moment when free users hit the paywall. By clearly explaining what happens next and immediately reinforcing the value and affordable pricing, it reduces friction, builds trust, and encourages sign-up rather than abandonment.
